response: This function implements a single-pass linear-scan lexer (tokenizer), a core preprocessing pattern for expression parsing, that processes an input arithmetic string left-to-right to split it into structured, typed tokens. It skips whitespace, converts integers and decimal floats into ('NUM', float_value) tokens, categorizes arithmetic operators (+-*/) and parentheses as ('OP', symbol) tokens, and raises an error for any unrecognized invalid characters.
